question: When and where will the 4th International Conference on WELA 2026 be held?
gold_answer: WELA 2026 will be held at the Cavite State University International Convention Center on March 17-19, 2026.

question: What is the deadline for submitting abstracts to WELA 2026?
gold_answer: The deadline for submission of abstracts is March 5, 2026.

question: What does the WELA 2026 registration fee cover?
gold_answer: The registration fee covers the conference kit and meals for three (3) days, consisting of morning snacks, lunch, afternoon snacks, and dinner. Accommodation is not included.

question: Saan ako pwedeng mag-register para sa WELA 2026?
gold_answer: Pwede kang mag-register para sa WELA 2026 sa bit.ly/WELA2026Registration.

question: May contact email ba para sa WELA 2026 conference kung gusto kong mag-inquire?
gold_answer: Oo, pwede kang mag-reach out sa wela2026@cvsu.edu.ph, o i-follow sila sa Facebook sa @CvSUGADResourceCenter para sa updates.

question: What does WELA stand for?
gold_answer: WELA stands for Women Empowerment and Leadership in Agriculture, Aquatic and Natural Resources.

question: What are the conference subthemes for WELA 2026?
gold_answer: The WELA 2026 subthemes are Climate-Smart & Resilient Practices; Circular Economy & Waste Valorization; Digital Transformation; Green & Blue Economies; and Capacity Building & Policy Reform.

question: Kasama ba ang accommodation sa registration fee ng WELA 2026?
gold_answer: Hindi kasama ang accommodation sa registration fee. Sakop lamang nito ang conference kit at pagkain para sa tatlong (3) araw.

question: What is LINGAP CvSU?
gold_answer: LINGAP CvSU (Leaders Integrating Networks for General Aid Preparedness) is Cavite State University's centralized hub for volunteerism and service initiatives. It coordinates the University's community-led efforts to respond more effectively to the needs of communities.

question: What does the acronym LINGAP stand for?
gold_answer: LINGAP stands for Leaders Integrating Networks for General Aid Preparedness (LINGAP CvSU).

question: When and where was the ESC orientation on LINGAP CvSU held?
gold_answer: The Extension Services Center (ESC) conducted the orientation on January 8 at the Technology Demonstration Farm Training Hall. It was held in two batches for Main Campus student leaders.

question: Who led the LINGAP CvSU orientation for student leaders?
gold_answer: The orientation was led by Dr. Racquel G. Agustin, Director of ESC, and Engr. Arnelyn S. Romilla, Head of the Training Courseware and Development Division.

question: Anong mga aktibidad ang saklaw ng LINGAP CvSU program?
gold_answer: Ayon sa ESC, ang mga community-led na gawain tulad ng outreach programs, relief-giving activities, educational workshops, clean-up drives, at health fairs ay pinag-uugnay na ngayon sa ilalim ng LINGAP CvSU program.

question: Sino ang mga dumalo sa LINGAP CvSU orientation na ginawa ng ESC?
gold_answer: Ang orientation ay dinaluhan ng mga representative mula sa iba't ibang academic at non-academic student organizations sa Main Campus, at ginanap ito sa dalawang batch.

question: Which CvSU office established and coordinates LINGAP CvSU?
gold_answer: The Extension Services Center (ESC) established LINGAP CvSU as the University's centralized hub for volunteerism and service initiatives, and now coordinates the community-led efforts under it.

question: Why did CvSU establish LINGAP CvSU?
gold_answer: In line with its support for inclusive and sustainable development, CvSU established LINGAP CvSU to strengthen its efforts to respond more effectively to the needs of communities, reinforcing its commitment to social responsibility and civic engagement.

question: What passing rate did CvSU achieve in the January 2026 Licensure Examination for Architects?
gold_answer: Cavite State University posted a 100% passing rate in the January 2026 Licensure Examination for Architects (LEA).

question: How many examinees passed the January 2026 Licensure Examination for Architects nationwide?
gold_answer: According to the Professional Regulation Commission, 1,998 out of 2,434 examinees passed the January 2026 LEA.

gold_answer: Nagkamit ang CvSU ng 100% passing rate sa January 2026 Licensure Examination for Architects (LEA).

gold_answer: Ginanap ang January 2026 LEA sa National Capital Region, Baguio, Cagayan de Oro, Cebu, Davao, Iloilo, Legazpi, Lucena, Pampanga, Rosales, Tacloban, Tuguegarao, at Zamboanga.

gold_answer: CvSU's Main Campus achieved a 95.56% passing rate in the June 2026 Licensure Examination for Architects.

question: Ilang bagong CPA ang na-produce ng CvSU at ano ang overall performance nila?
gold_answer: May 38 na bagong CPA ang CvSU, na may 57.58% overall performance.

question: Where does CvSU rank in the Times Higher Education (THE) Sustainability Impact Ratings 2026?
gold_answer: CvSU improved to the 1001-1500th ranking in the Times Higher Education (THE) Sustainability Impact Ratings 2026.

question: When was CvSU's announcement congratulating its new Licensed Architects posted?
gold_answer: The news article "CvSU congratulates its new Licensed Architects" was posted on January 28, 2026.

question: What anniversary did CvSU celebrate in 2026?
gold_answer: CvSU celebrated its 120th founding anniversary, commemorating 120 years of legacy. The main activities were held on January 28-29, 2026.

question: What was the theme of CvSU's 120th founding anniversary?
gold_answer: The theme was “ASCEND with Truth, Integrity, Excellence, and Service: The Heart of CvSU’s 120-year Legacy.”

question: Who is Don Severino de las Alas and what is his connection to CvSU?
gold_answer: Don Severino de las Alas was an educator, public servant, and philanthropist who donated a portion of his land for the establishment of an intermediate school now known as CvSU. His heirs, along with officials, led the traditional wreath laying ceremony during the anniversary.

question: Sino ang pangulo ng CvSU na nagbigay ng kanyang unang State of the University Address sa anibersaryo?
gold_answer: Si CvSU President Dr. Ma. Agnes P. Nuestro ang naghatid ng kanyang unang State of the University Address sa opening program ng 120th Founding Anniversary.

question: Ano ang core values ng CvSU na binanggit sa 120th anniversary celebration?
gold_answer: Ang core values ng CvSU ay Truth, Integrity, Excellence, and Service, na siyang paggabay sa commitment nito sa quality education at nation-building.

question: Which newly-constructed school buildings were blessed during the anniversary?
gold_answer: The Administrative Council led the blessing of the Boys’ Dormitory; the Food Processing Building of the College of Agriculture, Food, Environment and Natural Resources; and the STAR Building.

question: What is the CvSU ASCEND: 2025-2028 Strategic Framework focused on?
gold_answer: The CvSU ASCEND: 2025-2028 Strategic Framework focuses on transformational leadership, a competent and committed workforce, administrative efficiency, and financial sustainability.

question: During which recognition event were CvSU employees, students, retirees, and partner agencies honored?
gold_answer: They were honored during the annual Gawad Laya at Diwa and Partners’ Recognition Day, which recognized their contributions to academic excellence and public service.

question: When and where was the Gawad Laya at Diwa and Partners' Recognition Day held?
gold_answer: The Gawad Laya at Diwa and Partners' Recognition Day was held on January 28 at the International Convention Center, as one of the highlights of CvSU's 120th founding anniversary celebration.

question: What was the theme of CvSU's 120th anniversary celebration?
gold_answer: The theme was 'ASCEND with Truth, Integrity, Excellence, and Service: The Heart of CvSU's 120-Year Legacy.'

question: Who received the Most Outstanding Student of the Year award?
gold_answer: Mr. Joseph Luke Emmanuel M. Ongliongco, a fourth year Bachelor of Science in Psychology student from the Bacoor Campus and current Deputy Student Regent of the Federation of Central Student Government, received the Most Outstanding Student of the Year award.

question: Sino ang nagbigay ng keynote speech sa CvSU@120 celebration?
gold_answer: Si Bacoor City Mayor Strike B. Revilla ang nagbigay ng keynote speech, kung saan binigyang-diin niya na ang 120 taon ng CvSU sa truth, integrity, excellence, and service ay hindi maliit na tagumpay.

question: Sino yung nanalo ng Tanglaw ng Mag-aaral Award (Faculty of the Year) at Kabalikat Award (Employee of the Year)?
gold_answer: Si Mr. Antonino Jose L. Bayson ang tumanggap ng Tanglaw ng Mag-aaral Award (Faculty of the Year Award), habang si Engr. Mary Joyce P. Alcazar naman ang nanalo ng Kabalikat Award (Employee of the Year Award).

question: Who is the CvSU President and what did she say in her message?
gold_answer: Dr. Ma. Agnes P. Nuestro is the CvSU President; in her message she said the University's story is not measured by time alone, but by the values it upholds, the lives it transforms, and the service it renders to society.

question: Who won the Administrator of the Year (Gabay ng CvSU Award) and the Researcher of the Year (Mananaliksik ng CvSU Award)?
gold_answer: Dr. Orlando B. Delos Reyes received the Gabay ng CvSU Award (Administrator of the Year Award), and Engr. Al Eugene Torres received the Mananaliksik ng CvSU Award (Researcher of the Year Award).

question: Which campuses won the Best Organizational Unit and Most Organized Unit awards in the academic cluster?
gold_answer: Carmona Campus won the Husay ng CvSU Award (Best Organizational Unit Award) for the Academic Cluster, while CvSU Cavite City Campus won the Pinakamaayos na Yunit Award (Most Organized Unit) for the Academic Cluster.

question: What QS Stars rating did CvSU receive?
gold_answer: CvSU earned a three-star (⭐⭐⭐) rating from Quacquarelli Symonds (QS) 2025, a globally recognized university rating system that evaluates institutions against international standards. The announcement was made on February 10, 2026.

question: How many stars did CvSU get for Facilities in the QS rating?
gold_answer: CvSU received a five-star (⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐) rating for Facilities in the QS 2025 assessment.

question: What does CvSU ASCEND stand for?
gold_answer: CvSU ASCEND stands for Advancing Sustained Change and Excellence for National Development, the framework that guided the University toward its QS rating.

question: Ilang stars ang nakuha ng CvSU sa Employability at Good Governance sa QS rating?
gold_answer: Nakakuha ang CvSU ng five-star (⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐) rating para sa Employability at gayundin sa Good Governance sa QS 2025 assessment.

question: Anong rating ang nakuha ng CvSU sa Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion?
gold_answer: Nakatanggap ang CvSU ng five-star (⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐) rating para sa Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion sa QS 2025 assessment.

question: Which areas did CvSU earn a perfect five-star rating in?
gold_answer: CvSU earned five-star (⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐) ratings in Facilities, Employability, Good Governance, and Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion.

question: Which categories did CvSU receive only two stars in on the QS rating?
gold_answer: CvSU received two-star (⭐⭐) ratings in Social Impact, Global Engagement, and Education and Training.

question: What is the QS rating system that assessed CvSU, and what does a three-star result mean?
gold_answer: QS (Quacquarelli Symonds) is a globally recognized university rating system that evaluates institutions against international standards. A three-star QS rating demonstrates strong overall performance across teaching, facilities, employability, governance, and other key areas, with clear potential for further growth on the global stage.

question: When and where did CvSU hold its public forum for the ECC amendment?
gold_answer: CvSU held the public forum for the amendment of its Environmental Compliance Certificate (ECC) conditions on February 9, 2026, at the SM Rolle Hall.

question: What does ECC stand for and why did CvSU hold the forum?
gold_answer: ECC stands for Environmental Compliance Certificate. CvSU held the forum, as part of the Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) process, to discuss the proposed amendments to its ECC conditions and the status of the University's compliance.

question: Which government agency did CvSU coordinate with for the public forum?
gold_answer: CvSU coordinated with the Department of Environment and Natural Resources – Environmental Management Bureau (DENR – EMB) CALABARZON for the public forum.

question: Kailan at para saang campus ipinagkaloob ang ECC ng CvSU?
gold_answer: Ipinagkaloob ng DENR – EMB CALABARZON ang ECC sa CvSU noong March 20, 2018 para sa Don Severino de las Alas Campus sa Brgy. Bancod, Indang, Cavite.

question: Who led the EIA study for CvSU and what was their role?
gold_answer: Prof. Noel A. Sedigo led the EIA study as the Project Leader/Study Leader for Land.

question: Who were the study leaders for People, Water, and Air in the EIA study?
gold_answer: Dr. Lilibeth P. Novicio was the Study Leader for People, Dr. Amyel Dale L. Cero was the Study Leader for Water, and Ms. Ailene H. Calamlam was the Study Leader for Air.

question: Sino-sino ang mga stakeholders na tinipon sa public forum ng CvSU?
gold_answer: Tinipon sa public forum ang community members, local government units, non-government organizations, at iba pang stakeholders para talakayin ang mga proposed amendments at ang compliance status ng University sa ECC conditions nito.

question: Ano ang layunin ng public forum para sa CvSU at sa mga stakeholders?
gold_answer: Nagbigay ang forum ng venue para sa CvSU at sa mga stakeholders na iraise ang kanilang mga concern, tukuyin ang mga isyu, at magrekomenda ng mga hakbang upang matugunan ang epekto ng operasyon ng University at masiguro ang proteksyon at konserbasyon ng natural resources.

question: What was CvSU's overall performance rating in the February 2026 Master Plumbers Licensure Examination?

gold_answer: According to the Professional Regulation Commission, 2,030 out of 3,287 examinees passed the February 2026 Master Plumbers Licensure Examination.

gold_answer: The national passing rate for the February 2026 Master Plumbers Licensure Examination was 61.76%.

question: Ilan sa mga CvSU examinees ang pumasa sa February 2026 Master Plumbers Licensure Examination?
gold_answer: Sampu (10) sa 12 na CvSU examinees ang pumasa, katumbas ng 83.33% overall performance rating.

question: Anong board ang nag-conduct ng Master Plumbers exam, and saan-saang lugar ito ginawa?

question: Did CvSU make it to the top performing schools in the Master Plumbers exam?
gold_answer: Yes, Cavite State University made it to the top 10 performing schools in the February 2026 Master Plumbers Licensure Examination with an 83.33% overall performance rating (10 out of 12).

question: Kailan ipinost ng CvSU ang balitang ito tungkol sa mga bagong lisensiyadong Master Plumbers?

question: Where can I see the full results of the February 2026 Master Plumbers Licensure Examination?
gold_answer: The full results are available on the Professional Regulation Commission (PRC) website, which posted the February 2026 Master Plumbers Licensure Examination results within three working days.

question: What accreditation status did CvSU recently receive?
gold_answer: Cavite State University was officially conferred with AACCUP Institutional Accreditation (IA) Level III certification. This marks CvSU's first institutional accreditation.

question: Which agency conducted CvSU's institutional accreditation, and when was the validation visit?
gold_answer: The accreditation was conducted by the Accrediting Agency of Chartered Colleges and Universities in the Philippines (AACCUP), Inc. Its team of evaluators conducted the technical review and validation visit on November 17-19, 2025.

question: Who accepted the accreditation certification on behalf of CvSU?
gold_answer: University President Dr. Ma. Agnes P. Nuestro and Quality Assurance Director Dr. Pia Rhoda P. Lucero accepted the certification.

question: Saan at kailan ginanap ang conferment ceremony ng CvSU accreditation?
gold_answer: Ginanap ang conferment sa 2nd National Network of Quality Assurance Agencies (NNQAA), Inc. Quality Assurance Summit and Conferment Ceremony 2026, noong March 5-7, 2026, sa Heritage Hotel Manila sa Pasay City.

question: Ilang key areas ang sinusuri sa IA evaluation, at ano-ano ito?
gold_answer: May siyam (9) na key areas na sinusuri: (Area I) Governance and Management; (Area II) Teaching, Learning and Evaluation; (Area III) Faculty and Staff; (Area IV) Research; (Area V) Extension, Consultancy and Linkages; (Area VI) Support to Students; (Area VII) Library; (Area VIII) Infrastructure and other Learning Resources; at (Area IX) Quality Assurance Culture.

question: Is this the first time CvSU has been institutionally accredited?
gold_answer: Yes. The AACCUP Level III conferment marks CvSU's first institutional accreditation, described as a significant milestone and a collective victory for the entire CvSU community.

question: What institutional pillars did CvSU reaffirm its commitment to through this accreditation?
gold_answer: CvSU reaffirmed its dedication to excellence across all institutional pillars: governance, academic instruction, research, community extension, and student services.

question: Totoo bang may AACCUP Level III accreditation na ang CvSU?
gold_answer: Oo, opisyal na iginawad sa Cavite State University ang AACCUP Institutional Accreditation (IA) Level III certification noong Conferment Ceremony 2026. Ito ang unang institutional accreditation ng CvSU.

question: Which accrediting agency accredited CvSU's academic programs?
gold_answer: CvSU's academic programs were accredited by the Accrediting Agency of Chartered Colleges and Universities in the Philippines (AACCUP), Inc.

question: How many curricular programs underwent AACCUP assessment, and from which units?
gold_answer: Ten curricular programs underwent assessment, coming from CAFENR; CCAT (Rosario) Campus; the College of Nursing (CON); Carmona Campus; Cavite City Campus; General Trias Campus; and the College of Advanced and Professional Studies (CAPS).

question: Which CvSU programs received Level IV re-accreditation?
gold_answer: BS Food Technology (CAFENR) and BS Industrial Technology (CCAT Campus) received Level IV re-accreditation.

question: Anong mga programa ang nakakuha ng Level III re-accreditation sa CvSU?
gold_answer: Ang mga Level III re-accredited na programa ay BS Medical Technology (CON), BS Business Administration (Carmona Campus), BS Computer Science (Carmona Campus), BS Information Technology (Cavite City Campus), at BS Business Administration (CCAT Campus).

question: May AACCUP accreditation ba yung BS Computer Science sa CvSU?
gold_answer: Oo, ang BS Computer Science (Carmona Campus) ay Level III re-accredited ng AACCUP.

question: Which programs got Level I accreditation and on which campuses?
gold_answer: BS Hospitality Management at the General Trias (GenTri) Campus and the Bachelor of Technical Vocational Teacher Education at the CCAT Campus received Level I accreditation.

question: What accreditation status does MS Food Science hold, and which units offer it?
gold_answer: MS Food Science holds Candidate Status, and it is offered by CAFENR and CAPS.

question: Kailan inanunsyo na nakatanggap ng AACCUP accreditation ang CvSU programs?
gold_answer: Inanunsyo ito noong March 11, 2026 sa isang news article ng Cavite State University.

question: What did CvSU turn over to DENR and the LGU of Maragondon?
gold_answer: The CvSU Research Center and the College of Agriculture, Food, Environment, and Natural Resources (CAFENR) turned over the seagrass research data of Cavite to DENR-PENRO Cavite and the LGU of Maragondon. The turnover happened during a ceremony on March 19, 2026.

question: When and where was the seagrass research turnover ceremony held?
gold_answer: It was held on March 19, 2026 at the University Interdisciplinary Research Building. The ceremony was themed "Rooted in Data, Safeguarding Cavite's Seagrass Ecosystem."

question: Ilan ang seagrass species na matatagpuan sa coastal waters ng Maragondon?
gold_answer: Ayon sa CvSU, may pitong (seven) seagrass species na matatagpuan sa coastal waters ng Maragondon.

question: Sino ang nag-present ng resulta ng seagrass research ng CvSU sa turnover?
gold_answer: Si Mr. Glenn Bryan A. Creencia, ang CvSU's designated Faculty Researcher, ang nag-present ng mga outcome ng seagrass research initiatives ng University.

question: Who is the University President who gave a special message at the turnover ceremony?
gold_answer: Dr. Ma. Agnes P. Nuestro, the University President, delivered a special message underscoring the University's pivotal role in the formulation of sustainable policies.

question: When did CvSU rediscover the last seagrass ecosystem of Cavite?
gold_answer: Mr. Glenn Bryan A. Creencia rediscovered the last seagrass ecosystem of Cavite in February 2020.

question: Why are seagrasses important according to CvSU's research?
gold_answer: Seagrasses provide ecosystem services such as food and habitat for many organisms, and they play a crucial role in oxygen production and carbon sequestration, making them essential in mitigating climate change.

question: Who accepted the seagrass research outputs on behalf of DENR-PENRO Cavite and LGU Maragondon?
gold_answer: Ms. Judaline A. Fabro, Assistant Management Services Division Chief and in-charge of the Office of DENR-PENRO Cavite, and Mr. Noah M. Caasi, Municipal Administrator of LGU Maragondon, delivered their pledge of acceptance and commitment to use the research outputs in their data-driven policies.

question: How many new licensed Electronics Engineers and Electronics Technicians did CvSU produce?
gold_answer: CvSU produced 23 newly licensed Electronics Engineers and Electronics Technicians.

question: What was CvSU's overall passing percentage in the March 2026 Electronics Engineers Licensure Examination?
gold_answer: CvSU achieved an 82.14% overall passing percentage in the March 2026 Electronics Engineers Licensure Examination (EELE), where the national passing rate was 61.62%.

question: Pang-ilan ang CvSU sa listahan ng top performing schools sa March 2026 EELE?
gold_answer: Ranked ikapito (seventh) ang CvSU sa listahan ng top performing schools na may 20 o higit pang examinees sa March 2026 Electronics Engineers Licensure Examination (EELE).

question: Sino ang naging isa sa third highest placers sa Electronics Technicians Licensure Examination, at ano ang score niya?
gold_answer: Si Ms. Pearl Anne T. Richards ang naging isa sa third highest placers sa March 2026 Electronics Technicians Licensure Examination (ETLE), na may 92% passing rate.

question: What was CvSU's overall performance rating in the Electronics Technicians Licensure Examination (ETLE)?
gold_answer: CvSU recorded an 88% overall performance rating in the March 2026 ETLE, while the national passing rate was 78.16%.

question: According to the PRC, how many examinees passed the March 2026 EELE nationwide?
gold_answer: According to the Professional Regulation Commission, 1,692 out of 2,746 examinees passed the March 2026 Electronics Engineers Licensure Examination (EELE).

question: Ilan ang pumasa sa ETLE sa buong bansa base sa PRC?
gold_answer: Base sa PRC, 1,907 out of 2,440 examinees ang pumasa sa March 2026 Electronics Technicians Licensure Examination (ETLE).

question: Which board administered the March 2026 electronics licensure exams and in which testing centers?
gold_answer: The exams were given by the Board of Electronics Engineering in March 2026 in the National Capital Region, Baguio, Butuan, Cagayan de Oro, Cebu, Davao, Iloilo, Koronadal, Legazpi, Lucena, Pampanga, Rosales, Tacloban, Tuguegarao, and Zamboanga.

question: What does AACCUP stand for?
gold_answer: AACCUP stands for the Accrediting Agency of Chartered Colleges and Universities in the Philippines, Inc., which recognized CvSU as one of its top performing institutions for quality assurance and academic excellence.

question: What accreditation status did CvSU achieve from AACCUP?
gold_answer: CvSU achieved Institutional Accreditation (Level III Accredited Status) from AACCUP, recognizing its commitment to quality assurance and academic excellence.

question: Who led the CvSU officials that received the AACCUP recognition?
gold_answer: CvSU officials were led by President Dr. Ma. Agnes P. Nuestro, who received the plaques of recognition for the University during the awarding ceremony.

question: Where and when was the 39th AACCUP National Conference and General Assembly held?
gold_answer: It was held at the Century Park Hotel in Malate, Manila on March 24, 2026.

question: How did CvSU rank among state universities for Level III accredited programs?
gold_answer: CvSU was recognized as the second top performing state university with the highest number of Level III accredited programs.

question: Anong parangal ang natanggap ng CvSU sa 39th AACCUP National Conference?
gold_answer: Kinilala ang CvSU bilang isa sa mga top performing institutions ng AACCUP at nakamit nito ang Institutional Accreditation (Level III Accredited Status). Tumanggap ang unibersidad ng mga plake ng pagkilala noong March 24, 2026.

question: Kailan at saan ginanap yung 39th AACCUP conference kung saan na-recognize ang CvSU?
gold_answer: Ginanap ito sa Century Park Hotel sa Malate, Manila noong March 24, 2026.

question: Sino ang pangulo ng CvSU na tumanggap ng parangal para sa unibersidad?
gold_answer: Si President Dr. Ma. Agnes P. Nuestro ang namuno sa mga opisyal ng CvSU at tumanggap ng mga plake ng pagkilala para sa unibersidad.

question: What award did CvSU receive from IPOPHL in March 2026?
gold_answer: Through its Innovations and Technology Support Office (ITSO), CvSU was honored with its fifth Platinum Award and first Palladium Award from the Intellectual Property Office of the Philippines (IPOPHL).

question: Where and when was CvSU given its IPOPHL Platinum and Palladium awards?
gold_answer: The awards were given during the ITSO Presidents' Summit and General Assembly held on March 25, 2026, at the Diversion 21 Hotel in Iloilo City.

question: Ano ang Palladium Award at bakit espesyal ito para sa CvSU?
gold_answer: Ang Palladium Award ang pinakamataas na parangal na ibinibigay ng IPOPHL sa mga top-performing ITSO. Ang CvSU ang unang higher education institution sa Southern Tagalog Region na nakatanggap nito.

question: How does an ITSO qualify for the IPOPHL Palladium Award?
gold_answer: The Palladium Award recognizes ITSOs that have consistently demonstrated excellence, specifically by qualifying for the Platinum Award for five consecutive years or by securing a patent in a foreign country.

question: Sino ang CvSU President na dumalo sa IPOPHL awarding?
gold_answer: Ang dumalo ay si CvSU President Dr. Ma. Agnes P. Nuestro, kasama ang iba pang mga opisyal ng unibersidad.

question: When did CvSU's ITSO become part of the IPOPHL network and when was it institutionalized?
gold_answer: In 2015, CvSU's ITSO officially became part of the IPOPHL network, and in 2017 it was institutionalized and established as a dedicated unit within the university's Knowledge Management Center (KMC).

question: What was the theme of the 2026 ITSO Presidents' Summit?
gold_answer: The theme was "15 years of Strengthening the Philippine TISCs: Innovation and Creativity Toward Sustainable Technology Transfer."

question: May iba pa bang parangal na natanggap ang CvSU sa event na iyon?
gold_answer: Oo, bukod sa Platinum at Palladium Awards, ginawaran din ang CvSU ng special citation para sa patents and trademarks.

question: When is the new deadline to submit application or nomination documents for the two Private Sector Representatives (PSR) to the Governing Board?
gold_answer: The extended deadline for submission of application/nomination documents is April 13, 2026 at 6:00 PM.

question: Who should the PSR application or nomination letter be addressed to?
gold_answer: It should be addressed to Asso. Prof. Ronan M. Cajigal, Chairperson of the CvSU Search Committee for Private Sector Representatives, thru Ms. Catherine J. Quiñones, Secretary of the CvSU Board of Regents.

question: Where can I get the prescribed forms for the PSR nomination?
gold_answer: Prescribed forms may be secured from the Office of the Board Secretary, 2nd Floor, Administration Building, Cavite State University, Indang, Cavite, or accessed through the provided Google Drive link.

question: Ano po ang email address kung saan pwedeng ipasa ang PSR nomination?
gold_answer: Ang email address ng Office of the Board Secretary ay obs@cvsu.edu.ph.

question: How many years of experience in the private sector are required to be eligible as a PSR?
gold_answer: A nominee must have at least five (5) years of employment, business, or practice of profession in the private sector.

question: Kailangan ba maging Filipino citizen at residente ng Cavite para maging PSR nominee?
gold_answer: Oo, dapat ang nominee ay Filipino citizen at legal age, at domiciled o residente nang hindi bababa sa dalawang (2) taon ng city o province kung saan matatagpuan ang SUC o mga campus nito.

question: What documentary requirements do I need to submit for the PSR nomination?
gold_answer: Requirements include a duly notarized application/nomination, a notarized Personal Data Sheet (CSC Form 212), a Certificate of Employment, a Service Record (if previously employed in government), NBI Clearance, a Certification of No Connection with the SUC, a Signed Commitment and Availability to serve, a Signed Conforme to the Conditions of PSR under Section 14, and other documents the SUC GB may require.

question: What are the selection criteria used to evaluate PSR candidates?
gold_answer: Candidates are evaluated on their prestige and prominence; past and current membership in civic, social, religious, and professional organizations; past and current achievements in their field of specialization; and knowledge, expertise, depth and breadth of experience, and business acumen.

question: What environmental awards did CvSU receive from DENR-EMB in 2026?
gold_answer: In the 2025 National Search for Sustainable and Eco-friendly Schools (NSSEFS) of DENR-EMB, CvSU received the Recognition of Excellence Award (College Category), the Luntiang Puso Sustainability Award (Champion – College Category), and the Water Leadership Award (College Category).

question: How much cash prize did CvSU get for being named one of the top eco-friendly schools?
gold_answer: CvSU received a PhP100,000 cash prize along with electronic devices for the University.

question: When and where was the NSSEFS awarding ceremony held?
gold_answer: The national awarding ceremonies were held on April 22, 2026 at Seda Vertis North Hotel in Quezon City.

question: Sino ang Pangulo ng CvSU na kinilala sa achievement na ito?
gold_answer: Si Dr. Ma. Agnes P. Nuestro, Pangulo ng Cavite State University, ang kinilala para sa exemplary leadership, kasama si For. Junser P. Magpantay, ang NSSEFS Overall Coordinator.

question: Ano ba yung Water Leadership Award na natanggap ng CvSU?
gold_answer: Ang Water Leadership Award (College Category) ay ibinibigay sa mga institusyong nagpakita ng natatanging commitment sa water conservation at management. Batay ito sa water-saving programs, rainwater harvesting initiatives, at wastewater treatment o recycling efforts.

question: What is the Luntiang Puso Sustainability Champion Award and how is it given?
gold_answer: The Luntiang Puso Sustainability Champion Award is a special recognition highlighting the “heart” of the NSSEFS. It is conferred upon the institution that achieved the highest overall rating among the top five finalists per category.

question: Which government agency ran the search that recognized CvSU as an eco-friendly school?
gold_answer: The recognition came from the National Search for Sustainable and Eco-friendly Schools (NSSEFS) of the Department of Environment and Natural Resources – Environmental Management Bureau (DENR – EMB).

question: Who led the national awarding ceremonies for the eco-friendly schools search?
gold_answer: The ceremonies were led by OIC Assistant Secretary for Environment and concurrent EMB Director Jacqueline A. Caancan, CESO III, together with EMB CALABARZON Regional Director Robert Angelo Metin.

question: How did the CvSU Main Campus perform in the April 2026 Registered Electrical Engineers Licensure Examination (REELE)?

question: What passing rate did the CCAT Campus get in the REELE?

question: Sino ang taga-CvSU na pumasok sa top eight ng REELE, at ano ang score niya?

question: What was CvSU's performance in the Registered Master Electricians Licensure Examination (RMELE)?

question: What is CvSU's ranking in the 2026 World University Rankings for Innovation?
gold_answer: Cavite State University improved to 217th place in the 2026 World University Rankings for Innovation (WURI), and placed within the Top 100 in 16 categories.

question: What does WURI assess and what does it stand for?
gold_answer: WURI stands for the World University Rankings for Innovation. It is a ranking system that assesses the societal and industry contributions of higher education institutions, with a focus on their innovative approaches to education, research, and society.

question: In which WURI category did CvSU rank the highest in 2026?
gold_answer: CvSU's highest 2026 WURI placement was 15th in Inclusive Social Innovation for the Underserved (C6).

question: Where did CvSU rank in AI-Based Teaching and Learning Transformation?
gold_answer: CvSU ranked 52nd in AI-Based Teaching and Learning Transformation (C4), placing it in the Global Top 100 for that category.

question: Anong ranggo ng CvSU sa 2026 WURI at ilang kategorya ito nakapasok sa Top 100?
gold_answer: Umangat ang CvSU sa 217th place sa 2026 World University Rankings for Innovation (WURI) at nakapasok sa Top 100 sa 16 na kategorya.

question: Kailan unang sumali ang CvSU sa WURI at ilang kategorya lang sila noon?
gold_answer: Unang sumali ang CvSU sa WURI noong 2024, kung saan nag-rank sila sa dalawang kategorya lang.

question: Saan naka-rank ang CvSU sa Ethics and Integrity category ng WURI 2026?
gold_answer: Nag-rank ang CvSU sa 26th sa Ethics and Integrity (A6), na pareho ring ranggo nila sa University-Based Entrepreneurial Projects (C7).

question: When was CvSU's 2026 WURI ranking announced, and where did it rank in Visionary Leadership?
gold_answer: The achievement was published on May 8, 2026. In the 2026 WURI, CvSU ranked 42nd in Visionary Leadership (B1).

question: Ilan ang CvSU graduates na naging topnotcher sa March 2026 LEPT?

question: Which licensure exam did CvSU excel in, and when was it held?
gold_answer: CvSU achieved remarkable results in the March 2026 Licensure Examination for Professional Teachers (LEPT), covering both the Elementary and Secondary Levels; the announcement was dated May 14, 2026.

question: Totoo ba na may CvSU campuses na nakakuha ng 100% passing rate sa LEPT?
gold_answer: Oo, ayon sa CvSU, several campuses ang nakamit ng perfect 100% passing rate sa March 2026 LEPT, na nagpapatunay ng commitment ng University sa quality teacher education.

question: What rank did CvSU achieve in the WURI 2026 rankings?
gold_answer: CvSU secured the 217th spot among the Top 500 Global Innovative Universities in the World University Rankings for Innovation (WURI) 2026.

question: What does WURI stand for?
gold_answer: WURI stands for the World University Rankings for Innovation.

question: When was the WURI 2026 awarding and recognition ceremony held?
gold_answer: The awarding and recognition ceremony for the WURI 2026 contributors was held on May 14, 2026.

gold_answer: Nakuha ng CvSU ang ika-217 na puwesto (217th) sa Top 500 Global Innovative Universities sa World University Rankings for Innovation (WURI) 2026.

question: Sino ang University President na namuno sa WURI 2026 recognition ceremony?
gold_answer: Si Dr. Ma. Agnes P. Nuestro, ang University President, ang namuno sa awarding at recognition ceremony para sa mga WURI 2026 contributors noong May 14, 2026.

question: What did CvSU's WURI 2026 result mean for the university?
gold_answer: Securing the 217th spot among the Top 500 Global Innovative Universities in WURI 2026 was described as a significant achievement highlighting CvSU's continuing pursuit of innovation, relevance, and transformative education on the international stage.

question: How many new CPAs does CvSU have from the May 2026 exam?

question: Nationally, how many examinees passed the May 2026 CPALE?

question: Ilang bagong CPA mayroon ang CvSU mula sa May 2026 board exam?
gold_answer: Mayroong 38 na bagong CPA ang Cavite State University mula sa May 2026 Certified Public Accountants Licensure Examination (CPALE).

question: Anong overall passing rate ng CvSU sa CPA board exam nung May 2026?
gold_answer: Nakakuha ang CvSU ng 57.58% overall performance rating sa May 2026 Certified Public Accountants Licensure Examination (CPALE).

question: Which board administered the May 2026 CPA Licensure Examination?

question: When did CvSU announce its 38 new CPAs?

question: What rank did CvSU get in the THE Sustainability Impact Ratings 2026?
gold_answer: CvSU improved to a 1001-1500th ranking in the Times Higher Education (THE) Sustainability Impact Ratings 2026.

question: How did CvSU place in the sustainability rankings before 2026?
gold_answer: CvSU previously placed 1501+ in the 2024 and 2025 THE Impact Rankings before improving to the 1001-1500th band in 2026.

question: In which SDG categories did CvSU earn its highest scores?
gold_answer: CvSU earned its highest scores in SDG 5 (gender equality) at 46.0-54.1, ranked 401-600th; SDG 11 (sustainable cities and communities) at 48.5-55.4, ranked 301-400th; and SDG 16 (peace, justice and strong institutions) at 54.3-59.1, ranked 301-400th.

question: Ilang SDG categories ang sinalihan ng CvSU noong 2026?
gold_answer: Pinalawak ng CvSU ang mga entry nito mula apat (four) tungo sa 10 SDG categories noong 2026.

Talactac, kasama ang CHED Commissioner Ricmar, ang tumanggap ng Sustainability Award sa Global Sustainable Congress na ginanap sa Indonesia Convention Exhibition (ICE), BSD City, Pagedangan, Tangerang Regency, Banten, Indonesia.

question: What does the THE Sustainability Impact Ratings measure?
gold_answer: The THE Sustainability Impact Ratings assesses educational institutions' research, stewardship, outreach, and teaching efforts that contribute to delivering the United Nations' Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).

question: Where did CvSU rank in SDG 4 (quality education) in 2026?

question: Sino ang Vice President for Research, Innovation, and Extension ng CvSU?

question: Which CvSU college is credited for the architects licensure achievement?
gold_answer: The achievement is credited to the College of Engineering and Information Technology, along with the newly licensed architects and faculty members.

question: Ilan ang pumasa sa CvSU sa June 2026 Architect licensure exam?
gold_answer: May 43 sa 45 examinees ng CvSU ang pumasa sa June 2026 Licensure Examination for Architects, na katumbas ng 95.56% passing rate.

question: Totoo ba na n-surpass ng CvSU yung national passing rate sa architects board exam?

question: When was the CvSU architects licensure achievement announced?
gold_answer: The achievement was announced in a news article dated June 29, 2026, celebrating CvSU's performance in the June 2026 Licensure Examination for Architects.

question: What is the Transparency Seal and what is CvSU committed to through it?
gold_answer: Through its Transparency Seal, Cavite State University is committed to transparency, accountability, and good governance, giving public access to key government documents, reports, and disclosures in compliance with the Transparency Seal.

question: Where can I find the names of CvSU's officials with their positions and contact information?
gold_answer: Section I of the Transparency Seal covers the agency's mandate and functions, the names of its officials with their position and designation, and contact information, listed under 'CvSU Key Officials'.

question: Is Cavite State University ISO certified, and until when is the certificate valid?
gold_answer: Yes, CvSU holds an ISO 9001:2015 QMS certification for at least one core process by an international certifying body, and the certificate is valid until 03 Dec 2027.

question: May Freedom of Information (FOI) manual ba ang CvSU na nasa Tagalog?
gold_answer: Oo, kasama sa Transparency Seal ang Freedom of Information Manual pati na ang One-Page FOI Manual sa English at sa Tagalog, na pinirmahan ng head of agency.

question: Saan ko makikita yung Annual Procurement Plan ng CvSU?
gold_answer: Nasa Section V (Annual Procurement Plan) ng Transparency Seal ang mga APP ng CvSU, kabilang ang Indicative FY 2026 APP NON-CSE at ang FY 2025 Annual Procurement Plan.

question: Which financial report shows CvSU's appropriations, allotments, obligations, disbursements and balances?
gold_answer: That is FAR No. 1: SAAOBDB, the Statement of Appropriations, Allotments, Obligations, Disbursements and Balances, published quarterly under the Annual Financial Reports section.

question: What is FAR No. 5 in CvSU's Transparency Seal?
gold_answer: FAR No. 5 is the Quarterly Report on Revenue and Other Receipts, listed under the Annual Financial Reports section of the Transparency Seal.

question: Does CvSU disclose SALN compliance of its officials?
gold_answer: Yes, Section IX includes the Certificate of Compliance – SALN Submission for 2024 and 2023, along with the Review and Compliance Procedure and the Review and Compliance Committee.

question: What is the vision of Cavite State University?
gold_answer: CvSU's vision is to be the premier university in historic Cavite, globally recognized for excellence in character development, academics, research, innovation and sustainable community engagement.

question: Which Republic Act converted Don Severino Agricultural College into Cavite State University?
gold_answer: Republic Act No. 8468 converted the Don Severino Agricultural College in the Municipality of Indang, Province of Cavite into a state university known as the Cavite State University. Its Section 2 provides the University's mandate.

question: What are the core values of CvSU?
gold_answer: CvSU's four core values are Truth, Integrity, Excellence, and Service.

question: Ano ang mithiin ng Pamantasan ng Cavite State University?
gold_answer: Ang mithiin ng CvSU ay ang maging nangungunang pamantasan sa makasaysayang Kabite na kinikilala sa kahusayan sa paghubog ng mga indibidwal na may pandaigdigang kakayahan at kagandahang asal.

question: Ano ba yung mission ng CvSU pagdating sa mga graduates na nililikha nila?
gold_answer: Layunin ng CvSU na magbigay ng excellent, equitable at relevant na edukasyon sa arts, sciences at technology sa pamamagitan ng quality instruction at responsive research and development, at makalikha ng professional, skilled at morally upright na mga indibidwal para sa global competitiveness.

question: What does CvSU's Quality Policy commit the University to?
gold_answer: CvSU commits to the highest standards of education, values its stakeholders, strives for continual improvement of its products and services, and upholds the University's tenets of Truth, Excellence, and Service to produce globally competitive and morally upright individuals.

question: According to its charter, what is Cavite State University primarily mandated to provide?
gold_answer: Under Section 2 of Republic Act No. 8468, the University shall primarily provide advance instruction and professional training in agriculture, science and technology, education and other related fields, undertake research and extension services, and provide progressive leadership in these areas.

question: Ano-ano ang mga core values ng CvSU?
gold_answer: Ang apat na core values ng CvSU ay Truth, Integrity, Excellence, at Service.

question: When did Cavite State University first begin, and what was it originally called?
gold_answer: CvSU traces its beginnings to 1906 as the Indang Intermediate School, with the American Thomasites as its first teachers.

question: When exactly did DSAC become Cavite State University, and under what law?
gold_answer: On January 22, 1998, by virtue of Republic Act No. 8468, Don Severino Agricultural College (DSAC) was converted into Cavite State University.

question: Ilan ang campus ng CvSU sa buong lalawigan ng Cavite?
gold_answer: Sa kasalukuyan, ang CvSU ay may 11 campuses sa lalawigan ng Cavite.

question: Where is the CvSU main campus and how big is it?
gold_answer: The main campus is the Don Severino delas Alas Campus in Indang, Cavite, with a land area of approximately 70 hectares.

question: Kailan naging State College ang paaralan at anong Republic Act ang basehan nito?
gold_answer: Noong 1964, ang paaralan ay ginawang State College sa bisa ng Republic Act 3917 at naging kilala bilang Don Severino Agricultural College (DSAC).

question: How many students and faculty and staff does CvSU have?
gold_answer: CvSU has more than 25,000 students and 1,200 faculty and staff across all its campuses.

question: Anong dalawang paaralan ang na-integrate sa CvSU noong 2001?
gold_answer: Noong 2001, ang Cavite College of Fisheries (CACOF) sa Naic at ang Cavite College of Arts and Trade (CCAT) sa Rosario ay isinama sa Unibersidad sa bisa ng CHED Memo No. 27 s. 2000.

question: What is CvSU's vision as a university?
gold_answer: CvSU aims to be the "premier University in historic Cavite recognized for excellence in the development of globally competitive and morally upright individuals," guided by its commitment to Truth, Excellence and Service.

question: What has CvSU been designated as by the Department of Agriculture?
gold_answer: The Department of Agriculture designated CvSU as the National Center for Research and Development for Coffee and Urban Agriculture; it is also accredited by TESDA as a Trade and Testing Venue.

question: Kailan magsisimula ang enrollment at may free tuition ba sa CvSU?
gold_answer: Dalawa ang tanong mo kaya sasagutin ko pareho.
